mapper.select: SELECT GET_AR_DATETYPE(#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DATE_TYPE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME( GET_AR_DATETYPE(#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS DATE_TYPE_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME( GET_AR_SHIFTNO(#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS SHIFT_NAME, TO_CHAR( TO_DATE(GET_AR_SHIFT_END_TIME(#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI'), 'HH24:MI' ) AS SHIFT_END_TIME, TO_CHAR( TO_DATE(GET_AR_SHIFT_END_TIME(#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') + 1/12, 'HH24:MI' ) AS SHIFT_END_TIME_2, TO_CHAR( TO_DATE(GET_AR_SHIFT_START_TIME(#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI'), 'HH24:MI' ) AS SHIFT_START_TIME, GET_AR_TIME_BY_CPNYID(#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'IN', #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS INDOOR_TIME, GET_AR_TIME_BY_CPNYID(#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'OUT', #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS OUTDOOR_TIME, GET_AR_OT_TOTAIL(#{applyDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '30') AS OT_TOTAIL_MONTH, GET_AR_OT_TOTAIL(#{applyDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '200') AS OT_TOTAIL, GET_AR_OT_TOTAIL(#{applyDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '141444') AS WEEKDAY_OT_TOTAIL, GET_AR_OT_TOTAIL(#{applyDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '141445') AS WEEKEND_OT_TOTAIL, GET_AR_OT_TOTAIL(#{applyDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '141446') AS HOILDAY_OT_TOTAIL, (SELECT OT_LIMIT FROM HR_EMPLOYEE WHERE PERSON_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS OT_LIMIT, (SELECT OT_LIMIT_100 FROM HR_EMPLOYEE WHERE PERSON_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS OT_LIMIT_100 FROM DUAL
